title: cydonia silvestris var. oblonga
intro: Cydonia silvestris var. oblonga, also known as the wild quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cydonia silvestris var. oblonga include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's fruits, flowers, and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
